summary: Completed testing of Iteration 159: Social Media Growth Engine expansion (4->7 levels) and profitCalculations.js refactoring. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Profit Tracker loads correctly with refactored imports, HabitTrackerPage displays 7-level roadmap (Seed→Sprout→Bloom→Crown→Star→Rocket→Diamond).

minor.issue: Legacy tasks created before task_type field was added don't have task_type - expected behavior for existing data

critical_code_review_comments: profitCalculations.js refactoring is clean - barrel re-export pattern preserves backward compatibility
Legacy social tasks don't have task_type field - new tasks will include it automatically
The 7-level system with dynamic task counts (3/4/5) is correctly implemented
Habit reward scaling (5/10/20/35/50/70/100 points) for 7 tiers is implemented in _award_habit_points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Growth Engine now has 7 levels with thresholds: L1(0-7), L2(8-21), L3(22-45), L4(46-59), L5(60-79), L6(80-99), L7(100+). Task counts: L1-3=3 tasks, L4-5=4 tasks, L6-7=5 tasks. Next level thresholds: {1:8, 2:22, 3:46, 4:60, 5:80, 6:100, 7:None}. Reward points scale: 5/10/20/35/50/70/100 by streak tier. profitCalculations.js is now a barrel re-export of formatters.js, tradingDays.js, and projections.js.

profit_calculations_refactor.formatters.js: truncateTo2Decimals, formatFullCurrency, formatLargeNumber, formatCompact, MASKED_VALUE, maskAmount, formatMoney
profit_calculations_refactor.backward_compatibility: All existing imports continue to work via barrel re-export

frontend_ui_verified.profit_tracker_page: Loads correctly with stats cards showing Account Value, Deposits, Total Profit, LOT Size
frontend_ui_verified.habit_tracker_page: Shows 7-level roadmap, streak badges, social media growth section
